paragraphs.text: 爷爷喜欢下象棋。今天他教我怎么下。象棋有车马炮，每个棋子走法不一样。
paragraphs.translation: Grandpa likes to play Chinese chess. Today he taught me how to play. Chess has chariots, horses and cannons, each piece moves differently.

paragraphs.text: 我先学怎么摆棋，然后学每个棋子的走法。车走直线，马走日字，炮要隔一个打。
paragraphs.translation: I first learned how to set up the board, then the moves of each piece. Chariots go straight, horses move in an L-shape, cannons jump over one piece to capture.

paragraphs.text: 我和爷爷下了一盘。虽然输了，但是爷爷夸我学得很快。下次我一定会赢！
paragraphs.translation: I played a game with Grandpa. Even though I lost, Grandpa praised me for learning quickly. Next time I will definitely win!
